title: Day 1 Session 2 Satrajit Ghosh, DANDI: Distributed Archives for Neurophysiology Data Integration
description:
Session II. Neuroinformatics of Neurophysiology
Session II of the ODIN Symposium was focused on the neuroinformatics of neurophysiology. This session featured talks by leading experts from both academia and industry. The talks covered a wide range of topics, from BRAIN Initiative data archives to standard formats and pipelines. The session concluded with a discussion on the challenges in neuroinformatics in neurophysiology.
